title: Pre-conditioned analog sensor to ADC
prompt: I have an analog sensor board that already outputs a clean 0-3.3 V signal. I just need to bring that output into my ESP32-C3 ADC so firmware can read it. For the bench test the sensor is putting out its mid-scale value of about 1.65 V.

abstraction.reason: the pre-conditioned sensor presents a fixed voltage at the tested operating point; modelled with a #105 voltage_source stand-in (no internal sensor physics)
